title: Towards Boosting Confidence In Nigeria Financial Industry
description: Towards boosting confidence in Nigeria financial industry, after Mr Mike Oladele  discussion on “Rising Ponzi Scheme and Investment Scam in Nigeria, What we need to Know”  in Port Harcourt River State
